query:
-- Tag services with their data bundle group
UPDATE services svc
INNER JOIN revenue_groups rg
  ON rg.type = 'data_bundle'
  AND rg.customerExternalId = svc.customerExternalId
  AND rg.totalRevenue = svc.monthlyRevenue
SET svc.revenueGroupId = rg.groupId, svc.revenueGroupLabel = 'Data - Internet'
WHERE
  (svc.revenueGroupId IS NULL OR svc.revenueGroupId = '')
  AND (
    svc.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

UPDATE services svc

  AND rg.totalRevenue = svc.monthlyRevenue
SET svc.revenueGroupId = rg.groupId, svc.revenueGroupLabel = 'Data - Internet'
WHERE
  (svc.revenueGroupId IS NULL OR svc.revenueGroupId = '')
  AND (
    svc.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR svc.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  );
